---
title: "A Statistical Physics Perspective on Machine Learning"
---

This website hosts draft chapters based on lecture notes by **Florent Krzakala, Bruno Loureiro, Lenka Zdeborová, Antoine Maillard**.

## How to interact
- **Questions / comments:** use **GitHub Discussions**.
- **Typos / concrete fixes:** open a **GitHub Issue** (or submit a PR).

## Status
Chapters are evolving drafts. We will tag periodic releases so citations remain stable.
